name: Valdotoriums S-Bahn and Trams
author: Valdotorium
description: This mod adds simple S-Bahn commuter trains and Trams to the game (basically as its done in the Subwaybuilder modding documentation). S-Bahns are flexible in capacity, fast, and can cross roads. Trams are rather low capacity, slow, but can cross roads and are far more affordable to build than Light/Heavy Metro.
